title: Goli Soda public feedback — question types & presentation (for design handoff)
description: Machine-readable catalog of survey question types and template-level presentation. Pair with design-agent-prompt.txt for LLM briefing.

meta.product: Public feedback form (survey on customer phone / kiosk)
notes: Each screen shows a question title (prompt), optional help text below the title, then the interactive control.
Branding applies: logo, tenant primary/secondary CSS variables.
Template name is presentation-only (how controls render); surveys define which question types appear.

surveyPresentation.description: Per-channel template JSON; selects layout and variants for scale types.

ui_meaning.stepper: One primary question active per step; Next/Submit; optional progress.
ui_meaning.single_page: All questions in one scrollable page; submit at end.

ui_meaning.numeric: 0–11 grid (0–10), heatmap-style cells; labels 'Not at all likely' … 'Extremely likely'.
ui_meaning.segmented: Three bands (Not likely 0–6, Neutral 7–8, Very likely 9–10) with score chips.

ui_meaning.numeric: Buttons 1–5; scale labels Poor / Excellent at ends.
ui_meaning.emoji_5: Five vertical stacks: large emoji on top, text caption below (see default_emoji_scale in questionTypes).

renderer.ui_meaning: Same pattern as csat_5 but four points.

ui_meaning.thumbs: Yes / No: large emoji (👍🏾 / 👎🏾) with text label under; value Yes=2, No=1.
ui_meaning.emoji_2: In product, same visual as thumbs (Yes/No + 👍🏾/👎🏾).
ui_meaning.yes_no: Two text buttons 'No' and 'Yes' (no emoji row in default implementation).

auto_advance.ui_meaning: If true, stepper may advance after answer (product default often false).

legacy_csat_block.description: Older API may send csat.presentation instead of csat_5/4/2; digits maps to emoji_5 / emoji_4 / thumbs (not numbered buttons); stars preserves stars renderer; emoji maps to emoji scales.

questionTypes.label: Net Promoter Score
questionTypes.control_summary: Likelihood 0–10; template picks numeric heatmap or segmented bands.
questionTypes.accessibility: Radiogroup or button grid with clear range labels.

questionTypes.label: Customer satisfaction (5-point)

optional_options.description: Survey can supply exactly 5 option rows to override captions under emoji_5 renderer; values are fixed 1–5.

default_emoji_scale.layout: Horizontal row or wrapped row; centered; each cell: emoji above, caption below.

questionTypes.control_summary: Scale control per csat_5.renderer in surveyPresentation.

questionTypes.label: Customer satisfaction (4-point)

optional_options.description: Exactly 4 options can override emoji captions.

questionTypes.control_summary: Same family as csat_5 with four steps.

default_binary_visual.note: Stored values: Yes=2, No=1 for thumbs/emoji_2 style.

questionTypes.label: Single choice (buttons)
questionTypes.control_summary: Exclusive choice: horizontally laid out, centered, wrapped pill/button group.
questionTypes.accessibility: role=group labelled by question title; one selection only.

questionTypes.label: Multiple choice (buttons)
questionTypes.control_summary: Non-exclusive: same horizontal centered layout as single; hint 'Choose one or more' with checklist affordance; selected state shows checkmark.
questionTypes.accessibility: aria-pressed per option; group describedby hint.

questionTypes.label: Single choice (select)
questionTypes.control_summary: Native-style dropdown: label 'Select one', empty placeholder option.

questionTypes.label: Email address
questionTypes.validation_server: email-validator normalized form; optional question can stay empty unless required.
